European Commission Publishes Guidelines on AI Act Classification

15 January 2024

The European Commission has today published comprehensive guidelines to help organizations classify their AI systems under the EU AI Act (Regulation (EU) 2024/1689).

The guidelines provide clarity on the definition of AI systems, the risk-based classification framework, and the obligations for providers and deployers of high-risk AI systems.

Key references in this guidance include Article 6 (Classification rules for high-risk AI systems), Annex III (List of high-risk AI systems), and Recital 54 (Explanation of the risk-based approach).

Organizations are encouraged to review these guidelines and assess their AI systems accordingly. The guidelines will be supplemented by additional delegated acts and implementing acts in the coming months.
